description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 50 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 14 mins. His activity was primarily in Java, which accounted for 63% of his time, followed by Markdown at 22% and Other at 13%. He worked across 4 projects.
